features: CORDLESS – Achieve your beard styling needs with this stubble and beard trimmer that offers cordless capabilities allowing for freedom of use thanks to its battery power. Ideal for short beards, stubble, facial hair, necklines and sideburns
BUMP-FREE TRIMMING - Trim, shave, detail and outline with the Bump Prevent Battery Trimmer, ensuring a close trim without any irritation that can cause razor bumps on the skin
MULTIFUNCTIONAL – For Male Body Grooming this trimmer is ideal for trimming, outlining, body grooming, detailing and shaving
SUPERIOR CUTTING PERFORMANCE - Our precision ground blades ensure the best cutting performance, so you can achieve the look you want with ease
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - The sleek black and red design features a durable, non-slip grip to provide maximum comfort
description: Product Description Trim, shave, detail and outline with the Bump Prevent Battery Trimmer, ensuring a close trim without any irritation that can cause razor bumps on the skin. This trimmer features Wahl high carbon steel blades that use high precision blade grinding technology which are designed to stay sharp for longer and ensure the best cutting performance. Ideal for removing unwanted body and facial hair with its precision ground blades, you get high quality performance with every use. Battery powered for convenience; the Bump Prevent Trimmer is easily portable. It’s sleek design and soft touch grip enables full styling control with ease. The Bump-Prevent Battery Trimmer kit includes 3 attachment combs for added length between 0.5mm – 4.5mm, enabling opportunity for various short style options. The sleek black and red trimmer uses a soft touch design making it extra comfortable to use and is battery powered for both convenience and portability. Directions 1. Charge the trimmer. 2. Choose the desired attachment comb. 3. Attach the comb to the trimmer. 4. Adjust the trimmer's length setting if applicable. 5. Trim the desired area of hair. 6. Clean the trimmer after use. Safety Warning Warning: this device contains sharp blades that can cause injury if handled improperly. Avoid skin irritation by carefully trimming and shaving. Do not use the device on children or near water sources. Follow the recommended cleaning and maintenance instructions. Batteries can pose a fire risk. Store and dispose of them according to applicable regulations. Box Contains 1 x Battery operated trimmer; 3 x Attachment combs; 1 x Moustache comb; 1 x Blade guard; 2 x AA batteries; 1 x Storage base; 1 x Cleaning brush & blade oil See more
